What is RECKON 1.O?

RECKON 1.O is an open 24-hour inter-college hackathon welcoming student innovators from any college or university. Organized by the Department of Computer Science & Engineering at Rural Engineering College, Hulkoti.

Form your team, pick your theme, and spend 24 non-stop hours building real solutions — with expert mentors, industry leaders, and fellow innovators by your side.

24HNon-Stop
4Max Team
4+Themes
🏆Big Prizes

Problem Domains
Hackathon Themes
Pick your domain and build solutions that matter
🌐
Web Development
Build responsive modern web apps with cutting-edge frameworks and powerful backends.
📱
App Development
Develop mobile-first solutions for Android or iOS that solve real-world problems.
🤖
Artificial Intelligence
Harness ML, deep learning, NLP, and computer vision to create intelligent systems.
💡
Open Innovation
No boundaries — IoT, blockchain, cybersecurity, or any creative tech solution.
Schedule
Event Timeline
24 intense hours — carefully crafted for maximum impact
April 17 — 8:30 AM
🕐 Registration & Check-In
Teams arrive, complete registration, collect kits and get oriented at the venue.
April 17 — 10:30 AM
🎉 Inauguration Ceremony
Opening by Dr. V M Patil (Principal) and Dr. S H Angadi (HOD). Special address by guest speakers.
April 17 — 12:00 PM
🚀 Hackathon Begins!
The clock starts. Teams begin hacking. Mentors available from the very beginning.
April 17 — 4:00 PM
🧠 First Round Evaluation
Mentors evaluate your ideation and initial progress.
April 17 — 10:30 PM
🆎 Mid-Night Evaluation
Judges assess midway project executions and architecture.
April 18 — 9:00 AM
⏳ Final Presentations
Final project presentations and live code demonstrations to the judging panel.
April 18 — 1:30 PM
🏆 Prize Distribution
Top teams present. Winners announced. Prizes & certificates distributed at closing ceremony.

Got Questions?
Frequently Asked Questions
Everything you need to know about RECKON 1.O
📑 General
Open to all students from any college or university. No CS background required — teams from any discipline are welcome.
Teams can have 2 to 4 members. Solo participation is not allowed. Members can be from different colleges.
No — RECKON 1.O is completely free to enter.
Yes, every team member should bring their own laptop with their development environment set up beforehand.
🌟 Themes & Rules
Themes are announced at kickoff and span AI/ML, HealthTech, FinTech, EdTech, and Open Innovation.
No pre-coding allowed. All work must begin after the official kickoff. Planning, wireframes, and architecture are fine.
Yes! Meals and refreshments throughout the 24 hours. Accommodation for outstation participants — contact us to arrange.
🏆 Prizes & Judging
On Innovation, Technical Complexity, Feasibility, Presentation Quality, and Social Impact — by an expert panel.
Every participant gets a certificate, goodies, and access to our mentor network. Top teams win cash prizes, trophies, and internship opportunities.
